hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty' | grep -qiE '(node_modules|dist/|build/|\.vite/|\.cache/|\.turbo/|\.map$|\.min\.(js|css)$|package-lock|yarn\.lock|pnpm-lock|\.(png|jpg|jpeg|gif|webp|ico|svg|mp3|ogg|wav|m4a|mp4|webm|mov|ttf|woff2?|eot|wasm)$)' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Binary or build artifact — not useful in context"}}' || exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); F=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' <<<"$INPUT"); S=$(jq -r '.session_id // "default"' <<<"$INPUT"); L="/tmp/claude-reads-$S"; if grep -qxF "$F" "$L" 2>/dev/null; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Already read this file this session. Use what you have, or ask the user to confirm it changed."}}'; else echo "$F" >> "$L"; fi

npx prettier --write '**/*.{js,ts,html,css,json}' --log-level silent 2>/dev/null; if [ -d dist ]; then SIZE=$(du -sk dist 2>/dev/null | cut -f1); BUDGET=500; if [ "$SIZE" -gt "$BUDGET" ]; then echo "⚠️  Bundle: ${SIZE}KB (budget ${BUDGET}KB) — exceeded by $((SIZE-BUDGET))KB"; else echo "✓ Bundle: ${SIZE}KB / ${BUDGET}KB"; fi; fi; INPUT=$(cat); MSGS=$(jq -r '.transcript_path // empty' <<<"$INPUT" | xargs wc -l 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}'); if [ "${MSGS:-0}" -gt 80 ]; then echo '💡 Session is long — consider /compact before next major task.'; fi; osascript -e 'display notification "Idle" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null
echo 'Post-compact: re-read CLAUDE.md, preserve the current game system being worked on, discard unrelated discussion.'
